message_summary: Lead instructed the active historical_researcher writer to incorporate M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-ART-COORDINATION-001 into the current Beta culture/history/language review, treating stale progress descriptions as non-authoritative and avoiding UI implementation.
required_target_action: Include UI/localization/visual-direction cultural, historical, language, debug-vs-player-mode, concept-art mapping, and Human Gate risks in the REVIEW handoff for qa_reviewer.
